stemHtml: What is the main activity of a Volcanic Ash Advisory Centre?

options.a: Inform pilots flying in lower airspace, directly via Automatic Dependent Surveillance Broadcast, about volcanic ash near controlled airfields.
options.b: Advise airline companies and military squadrons about the status of volcanic ash contamination in class A airspace.
options.c: Provide information about the lateral and vertical extent and forecast movement of volcanic ash following a volcanic eruption.
options.d: Provide warnings about potential eruptions of sleeping or non-active volcanoes to all users of the airspace by SIGMETs.
